original_statement: who came in first in the general standings?
mutated_statement: who came in first and last in the overall rankings?
mutation_analysis: [Scope expansion] + [Lexical substitution]: Added "and last" to broaden the query to both extremes | "general standings" → "overall rankings" (near-synonym) (who came in first in the general standings? → who came in first and last in the overall rankings?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确处理范围扩展并执行无矛盾指令
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息：judge_thought 明确指出表格按名次列出，Rank 1 为 Alejandro Valverde，最低名次 10 为 David Moncoutié，且判定结果为正确（"alejandro valverde|david moncoutié"）。Agent 的具体表现：在日志中依次执行了 select_column、sort_column、simple_query，并在 simple_query 的 thought 中直接给出“第一名是 Alejandro Valverde，最后一名是 David Moncoutié”的解释与答案。归类理由：变异问题只是对范围的扩展（从只问第一名扩展到第一和最后），并无内在矛盾，Agent 未表现出识别或修正矛盾的必要，而是正确解析并执行了新增的需求，因而应归入“正确处理范围扩展并执行无矛盾指令”。
